meta.title: A Challenging Crossroad: Media and Politics in Iran
meta.description: Hudson Institute in cooperation with the Broadcasting Board of Governors (BBG) held a discussion on current trends and insights on Iran and the information battlefield at the intersection of foreign policy, media and technology.
